title: Portfolio Website — Azure Cloud Architecture
description: Production-grade portfolio built on Azure as a living reference architecture. Runs on Azure App Service (B1, Central India) with a RAG-powered AI chatbot and an AI Writer that drafts complete blog posts end-to-end — including AI-generated cover images via gpt-image-2. Powered by Azure AI Foundry (gpt-5.4 primary · gpt-4o secondary · text-embedding-3-small RAG), passwordless Managed Identity auth, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and Application Insights monitoring. Every infrastructure decision is documented at /architecture.
outcomes: 7 Azure services: App Service B1, AI Foundry (gpt-5.4), Azure OpenAI Image Gen (gpt-image-2), Blob Storage, App Insights, Managed Identity, GitHub Actions
AI Writer — drafts full blog posts and case studies end-to-end with AI-generated cover images (gpt-image-2-1, East US 2) in one click
RAG chatbot grounded on portfolio content using gpt-5.4 + file_search vector store + Microsoft Learn MCP tool
Zero API keys in production — Managed Identity with Cognitive Services User + Azure AI Developer RBAC
~3 minute git push to live via GitHub Actions standalone zip deploy + automated smoke tests across 13 routes

title: SupportIQ — Generative AI for Support Automation
description: Built a Generative AI solution on Azure to automate support workflows for engineering teams. Leveraged Azure OpenAI and AI Foundry to intelligently triage, route, and resolve common support issues without manual intervention.
outcomes: Reduced manual effort by ~1 hour per engineer per day
Improved support engineer efficiency by 14%
Delivered measurable operational and customer experience improvements

title: Cloud-Ready Academy — Azure Skilling at Scale
description: Led end-to-end design of a structured Azure skilling initiative. Built hands-on labs, capstone projects, and learning modules to upskill diverse engineering audiences on cloud-native development and architecture.
outcomes: Achieved 95% skills enhancement rate among participants
Scaled cloud learning to thousands of engineers
Built reusable lab content now used across multiple cohorts

title: Cloud-Native Platform Modernization
description: Led the modernization of a legacy monolithic application to a cloud-native, containerized microservices architecture on Azure Kubernetes Service. Implemented GitOps, observability, and zero-downtime deployment strategies.
outcomes: Deployment frequency increased from weekly to daily
Mean time to recovery reduced from hours to minutes
Infrastructure costs reduced by 40%

title: Agentic AI Workflow Automation
description: Designed and implemented an Agentic AI system using Azure AI Foundry and Semantic Kernel that autonomously handles multi-step business workflows — from data ingestion and analysis to report generation and stakeholder notification.
outcomes: Automated 12 previously manual end-to-end workflows
Reduced processing time by 80% on targeted workflows
Zero human intervention required for standard workflow execution

title: Azure Landing Zone for Startups
description: Designed a right-sized Azure Landing Zone for a high-growth startup — hub-spoke networking, Azure Policy governance, identity baseline, and a self-service developer platform. Balanced enterprise-grade security with startup velocity.
outcomes: New environment provisioning: 2 weeks → 2 hours
Security baseline achieved from day one
Passed investor due diligence cloud security review

title: DevOps Platform Engineering
description: Built an internal developer platform enabling self-service infrastructure provisioning, CI/CD pipeline templates, and standardized observability across multiple engineering teams.
outcomes: Developer onboarding time reduced from 3 days to 2 hours
CI/CD pipeline adoption increased to 100% of teams
Deployment lead time reduced by 65%
